title: SEC Team Meeting At National Assembly
description: L-R,  Deputy Director,  Legal Department, Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Bernard Ebe,  Directorr, Investment Management SEC Mr Tunde Kamali and  Director,  Registration, Exchanges and Market In
html: L-R,  Deputy Director,  Legal Department, Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Bernard Ebe,  Directorr, Investment Management SEC Mr Tunde Kamali and  Director,  Registration, Exchanges and Market Infrastructure / Fintech SEC Mr Abdulkadir Abbas Appearing at the National Assembly Abuja.
